title: The Goose with the Golden Eggs
synopsis: A farmer owns a goose that lays one golden egg every day. A story about patience and the danger of greed.
sentences: A farmer and his wife owned a Goose that laid one golden egg every day.
Each morning, they found a shining egg in the nest and sold it for a good price.
Soon, they had more money than they had ever known before.
But instead of feeling thankful, they began to want even more.
The farmer said, "If the Goose lays golden eggs, there must be a great treasure inside her."
His wife agreed, and they made a foolish plan.
They decided to cut the Goose open at once and take all the gold together.
But when they did, they found only what is inside any ordinary goose.
There was no hidden treasure at all.
Worst of all, the Goose was gone, and no more golden eggs would ever come.
The farmer and his wife wept over their loss.
By wanting too much too quickly, they lost the steady gift they already had.
